CustomField.description: Checked when any threshold/interval value is entered on the catalog level
CustomField.formula: IF( OR( leaseworks__Interval_2_Cycles__c>0, leaseworks__Interval_2_Hours__c>0, leaseworks__Interval_2_Months__c>0, leaseworks__Never_Exceed_Period_Cycles__c>0, leaseworks__Never_Exceed_Period_Hours__c>0, leaseworks__Never_Exceed_Period_Months__c>0 ),true, false )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Checked when any threshold/interval value is entered on the catalog level
CustomField.label: Interval Customized
